_comment: EXAMPLE week-to-week / day-to-day overrides, layered over data/availability.template.json. Copy and edit per week; never edit the template for a one-off change. base_flags apply to every day; per-day flags add to them. Per-day keys: rest, unavailable, choose (option id), flags (list), extra_sessions (ad-hoc slots), note. For genuinely date-specific changes use the 'dates' form (see availability.overrides.dated.example.json).

tuesday.note: Early meeting — train in the evening instead.

wednesday.note: Travelling back, take it as a rest day.

thursday.note: Skip gymnastics, just the comp class.

friday.note: WFH — open-gym PROTECT work during the day.

saturday.note: Weightlifting focus this week — drop the 7am CrossFit.
